calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-13-2025 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-13-2025 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being assigned by Department 206 for Prove-Up Hearing as to Defendant Moses M. Mukami

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505 - Matter not reported

Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank appearing represented by Roger Jackson, Esq.
Defendant Moses M. Mukami not appearing.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.

The matter is submitted.

Based on the documents filed, the statement made by Plaintiff and its Counsel, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, and against Defendant Moses M. Mukami, as follows:

Damages: $15,503.20
Prejudgment Interest: $0
Attorney Fees: $0
Costs: $420.00

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $15923.20

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Deeming The Truth Of The Matters Specified In Plaintiff'S Request For Admissions As Admitted; Declaration Of David Bartley, Esq.; Notice Of Lodging Of Proposed Order; Proposed Order
Off Calendar Jul-28-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s Motion For An Order Deeming The Truth Of The Matters Specified In Plaintiff's Request For Admissions As Admitted.

For Good Cause Appearing, the court GRANTS Plaintiff's Motion, and ORDERS that the truth of the matters specified in Plaintiff's Request for Admissions (Set One) propounded on Defended Moses M Mukami, as deemed admitted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.

Judge: Garrett L. Wong; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/GLW)
